creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
lwhsu       2007-04-11 10:37:05 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel/viewvc         Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    devel/viewvc/files   pkg-message.in 
  Removed files:
    devel/viewvc/files   patch-viewvc-install 
  Log:
  - Update to 1.0.4.
  - Remove unnecessary FETCH_DEPENDS.
  - Add install of viewvc.conf and cvsgraph.conf without overwriting user
    modified files and save them on port deinstall.
  - Remove patch-viewvc-install file and pkg-message messages.
  
  PR:             111467
  Submitted by:   Alexander Logvinov <ports AT logvinov.com>
  Approved by:    Jean-Baptiste Quenot <jbq AT caraldi.com> (maintainer)
                  clsung (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.25      +3 -6      ports/devel/viewvc/Makefile
  1.14      +3 -3      ports/devel/viewvc/distinfo
  1.2       +0 -16     ports/devel/viewvc/files/patch-viewvc-install (dead)
  1.3       +0 -7      ports/devel/viewvc/files/pkg-message.in
  1.8       +4 -0      ports/devel/viewvc/pkg-plist
